titleStmt.title: SII 17.157: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 157. (A.R. No. 137 of 1904.) TIRUKAṆṬHĒŚVARAM, CUDDALORE TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north wall of the central shrine in the Naṭanapādēśvara temple.

This inscription records the acceptance by Śivabrāhmaṇa Bhāradvāji Sadāśivan Tirunīlakaṇṭhan Tiruvēkambamuḍaiyān and his brothers, Tirukkaṇṇīśvaramuḍaiyāṉ and Kunikkum Pirān to burn half a sandhi lamp and Ārūr Tiruvaṇṇāmalai Bhaṭṭan to burn another half a sandhi lamp in the temple of Tirukkaṇṇīśvaram-uḍaiya Mahādēva in Śōḻakulavallinallūr in Paṭṭāṉpākkai-nāḍu in Gaṅgaikoṇḍaśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu for the money received from Nallūr Naṅgai probably related to Arugāmaṅgalaṅgiḻāṉ Ś[ā]mi Ti[ru]varaṅgam-uḍaiyaṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . cakravatti
kaḷ kulottuṅka co
ḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu
48 Āvatu kaṅkai
koṇṭacoḻavaḷanā
ṭṭu paṭṭāṉpākkai
nāṭṭu coḻakulavalli
nallūr tirukkaṇṇiśvaramu
ṭaiya mahādevaṟku Aru
kāmaṅkalaṅ kiḻāṉ cā
mi tiruvaraṅka muṭaiyā
yāṉ nallūr na
ṅkai pakkal Ikkoyili
l śivabrāhmaṇaṉ bhāradvā
ji sadāśivan tirunilaka
ṇṭan tiruvekampa muṭaiyānu
m Ivan tampi tirukkaṇṇīśvaramu
ṭaiyānum Ivan tampi ku
nikkum pirānum koṇṭa
canti viḷakku Arai Ārur ti
ruvaṇṇāmalai bhaṭṭan ko
ṇṭa canti viḷakku Arai
Āka viḷakku Onṟum can
tirātittavaṟ Erikka ka
ṭavomāka Upayamāka ko
ṇṭa kācu � nelIncomplete
Digital edition of SII 17.157 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
